no: Sorcerer kitpack adding 6 kits: Willbinder, Aberrant Mind, Fatespinner, Fey-Touched, Solar Adept, and Fell-Touched. Each kit trades one spell slot for unique abilities. Version v0 — early release. Compatible with Tome and Blood.
sum: Sorcerer kitpack adding 6 kits: Willbinder, Aberrant Mind, Fatespinner, Fey-Touched, Solar Adept, and Fell-Touched. Each trades one spell slot for unique abilities.

co.no: Installs all 6 sorcerer kits in one component.
